name: metrifi
description: MetriFi for Claude: one sign-in to the MetriFi platform plus the MetriFi site-design skills, for credit unions and banks.

plugins.name: metrifi
plugins.description: The MetriFi plugin: the MetriFi platform connection (Site Builder, GEO, and CRO tools), the client-report skill for auditing an institution's existing website, and the three-stage site-design skills. Self-contained — this is the only plugin you need.
